values.description: Base URL for the Vektrum API. Use https://vektrum.io for production.
Your Vektrum partner API key. Format: vkp_live_<64hex> (live) or vkp_test_<64hex> (test). Provisioned by Vektrum during onboarding.
UUID of the release to operate on. Set this before running confirm or fail requests. The Get Release test script auto-populates this variable.
Auto-populated by the Get Release test script. Holds the current execution_status of the last fetched release.
Auto-populated by the Get Release test script. Holds the execution_rail of the last fetched release. Must be 'external_manual' before calling confirm or fail.
